channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Raphael Does New York in Splendid Met Exhibition
item.description: The forever savant, new courtier style, Madonnas, killer portraits, altarpieces, and more.

item.title: Bill Maher: Left embraced gun control, now lionizes Mangione
item.description: BILL MAHER on Luigi Mangione: "It seems like five minutes ago when one of the big causes of the left was gun control, but now guns are the answer? I g...

item.title: The Comey Indictment Fails to Charge a ‘True Threat’
item.description: Prosecutors simply don’t have a case.

item.title: The British Equality Trap: Equal Pay for Unequal Work
item.description: The U.K.’s foolish approach to wage discrimination has left a host of economic problems in its wake.
